title: Returns — Direct (stylishkb.com / sinksdirect.ca)
body: Customers may return unused, uninstalled items in original packaging within 30 days of delivery. A return authorization (RA) number is required before shipping anything back. Restocking and return shipping may apply unless the item arrived damaged or defective. Refunds are issued to the original payment method within 5-7 business days after the returned item is received and inspected.

title: Returns — RONA orders
body: RONA orders follow RONA's return policy. Returns are processed through the RONA order reference. Request the order number and reason, confirm the item is unused and in original packaging, and provide the RONA return instructions. Do not issue a direct refund for marketplace orders — the refund is handled by the marketplace.

title: Returns — Wayfair orders
body: Wayfair manages its own returns and refunds. For a Wayfair return, direct the customer through their Wayfair account or confirm the return label was issued. Replacement parts for Wayfair customers can still be sent directly when the issue is a missing or defective component.

title: Shipping & delivery times
body: In-stock items ship within 1-2 business days. Standard ground delivery takes 3-7 business days within Canada and the continental US. Tracking is emailed automatically once the label is created. If a customer has not received tracking after 3 business days, confirm the shipping address and escalate to fulfillment.

title: Damaged or defective on arrival
body: If an item arrives damaged, request clear photos of the damage and the packaging. For a confirmed shipping damage or manufacturing defect, ship a free replacement or replacement part at no cost to the customer — no return of the damaged item is required unless requested. Log the case for quality tracking.

title: Limited warranty — sinks & faucets
body: STYLISH and Sinks Direct products carry a limited lifetime warranty against manufacturing defects for the original purchaser, covering materials and workmanship under normal residential use. The warranty does not cover damage from misuse, improper installation, abrasive cleaners, or normal wear. Proof of purchase is required for warranty claims.

title: Replacement parts requests
body: Common replacement parts include pop-up drains, drain gaskets, mounting clips, basket strainers, and aerators. Identify the model number from the customer's order or product sheet, confirm the specific part needed, and ship the replacement directly. Most small parts ship free for in-warranty products.

title: Pop-up drain & gasket fitment
body: Pop-up drains and drain gaskets are matched to the sink model. If a customer reports a leaking or missing gasket, confirm the model number and ship the correct gasket. Provide the basic installation note: hand-tighten the locknut, ensure the rubber gasket is seated flat, and do not overtighten.

title: Finish & color questions
body: Finishes available across the range include Stainless Steel, Graphite Black, Brushed Nickel, Polished Chrome, Gold, Gun Metal, Matte Black, Pearl White and Granite Composite. Slight variation between batches or against on-screen photos is normal. If a customer believes they received the wrong finish, request photos and the order number to verify against the model ordered.

title: Product reviews & feedback
body: Thank the customer for their feedback. For a positive review, express appreciation and invite them to share it on the marketplace listing. For a negative review tied to a product issue, apologize, offer a concrete resolution (replacement part, replacement unit, or warranty claim), and follow up to confirm the issue is resolved.

title: General inquiries & contact
body: For order status, provide the latest tracking. For product availability, confirm against current stock. For anything outside policy or requiring a manager decision (goodwill credits, large-volume orders, escalations), acknowledge the request warmly and route to a specialist. Care hours and contact details are on stylishkb.com and sinksdirect.ca.

title: Product Care (1/8)
body:
The materials used in our products have been carefully chosen to comply with North America Plumbing Standards. Treated with care, the products will ensure many years of service.
In order to preserve appearance with minimum effort, we offer the following advice. These recommendations are intended to assist you, our customer. They are based on our experience and judgment but must not be regarded as amounting to a legal warranty or liability on our part.
Many times the pump itself or the end of the nozzle can get clogged with hard soap particles, dirt or other buildup. Following some simple steps, can get your soap dispenser working property.
Check the tube that is connected to the pump lever the part that pushes down on for the soap to be dispensed) to be sure that the tubing is cleared of any debris. Look to see if there are any hard particles or buildup within the tube.
​Check the tube that is connected to the pump lever (the part you push down on for the soap to be dispensed) to be sure that the tubing is cleared of any debris. Look to see if there are any hard particles or buildup within the tube.

title: Product Care (2/8)
body:
Turn the tube upside down so that the pump part is upside down and the opening of the tube is toward the ceiling. Run the tube under hot water for 2 to 3 minutes, allowing any buildup inside the tube to be flushed out. Also run the pump dispenser (where the soap comes out) under the hot water as well.
Place the small pipe cleaner inside the tube and run it in both a circular motion and up and down several times within the tube to help clean it out. Also take the pipe cleaner into the pump dispenser hole to be sure it is also clear of any debris.
With a sharp object such as a safety pin, gently clean out the tip of the nozzle of all hardened soap.
To clean a bamboo cutting board
Hand wash your board under warm water and scrub it with a spay sponge.
Sanitize or disinfect your board from time to time. Soak a cloth in a solution of half water, half white vinegar, then wipe both sides of the board.
Dry the board in a vertical position.
If you want to get your board back to “looking new” appearance, use bamboo finishing oil.
For best care of your bamboo cutting board, avoid:
Washing your board in the dishwasher
Using hard chemicals, like bleach

title: Product Care (3/8)
body:
Clean the faucet frequently using mild soap or an on-abrasive cleaner and then quickly rinse with water and dry with soft cloth only. Using abrasive cleaners, solvents, acid cleaners or any scrubbing detergent, polisher or scraper will damage the finish and void the warranty.
Search videosSearch video...
Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum, grease and dirt.
Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing.
Scrub the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge.
Wipe the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water stains.
For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth.
Composite Granite Sink Care
Made from 80% Quartz and 20% Acrylic Resin, this special hardened composite is highly stain, scratch, heat and dent resistant, and is also easy to clean and maintain.​
Recommended Regular Cleaning
Clean regularly with hot soapy water and a soft cloth, this is much easier and preferable to the sink finish than infrequent 'heavy' cleaning.

title: Product Care (4/8)
body:
Use a mix of 50% water and white vinegar to remove limescale deposits, ensure to rinse thoroughly after use, do not leave the vinegar in contact with the surface. A nylon sponge or toothbrush can be used in difficult areas. Dry the sink after use to delay future build up.
Always rinse the sink with water after preparing food or cleaning.
It should be noted that if the above advice has been followed then "deep cleaning" should not be necessary.​
Wipe dirt with a towel, rinse with lots of hot water.
Use 'Bar keepers friend' cleaning liquid and a stiff nylon brush or nylon scrubbing pad, this is good for removing stubborn stains and silver marks from metal cookware.
Always rinse the sink thoroughly after following any of the above steps.
Once the sink is clean, use a small amount of mineral oil to restore your sink's shine. Pour a few teaspoons of olive oil or mineral oil onto the sink and spread it with a clean cloth.
If these steps did not work 100%, repeat the procedure, as necessary.
How to Clean Pietra Sinks
In this video, we'll walk you through the step-by-step process to ensure your sink remains sparkling clean and well-maintained.
Composite granite sinks are renowned for their durability and aesthetic appeal, but proper cleaning is essential to preserve their beauty and functionality.
Stainless Steel Sink Care

title: Product Care (5/8)
body:
Stylish® stainless steel sinks are made from premium quality chrome-nickel steel, which offers excellent strength and hardness, is highly resistant to staining, rust and corrosion - plus it won't chip, craze, flake or break.
Discolouration and most marks on stainless steel are caused by water-borne deposits clinging to its surface. They are always the result of an outside source rather than coming from the steel itself.
Please follow these quick tips for daily sink cleaning and care:
Rinse and dry your sink with a clean soft cloth, working with, not across, the grain; to prevent surface spots and lime build up stains caused by the water we use.
Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain the original appearance of your sink.
Products like ‘Shiny Sinks’ or ‘Flitz & Bar Keepers Friend’ (available from most major supermarkets) can be used daily. It is helpful to dry the sink thoroughly after cleaning.
Using abrasive sponge pads, wire brushes, metal scrub packs or steel wool as these items will scratch your sink as well as dull the finish.

title: Product Care (6/8)
body:
Leaving salt, vinegar, citric fruit juices, mustard or pickles on the surface for any length of time as they can cause corrosion. Certain foods, when left for prolonged periods, can cause pitting and corrosion. Examples are citric fruit juices, salt, vinegar, mustard, pickles, and mayonnaise Strong acids can damage stainless steel (i.e., photographic developing liquids or denture cleanser). If they come in contact with the sink, they should be washed away immediately with clean water.
Abrasive cleaners such as bleach as these products will dull and tarnish the finish. Bleaches containing hypochlorite will attack stainless steel and cause pitting and staining. Silver dip cleaners contain acids which attack stainless steel and leave a permanent stain.
Defrosting frozen food directly on the surface of your sink as it will discolour the stainless steel. It is recommended to use a plate or pot which is placed in your sink.
Leaving wet sponges or cloths in or on the sink surface for long periods of time as they too may discolour the sinks. Similarly, the use of rubber coated mats may discolour the sink under prolong use.
How To Remove Scratches On A Stainless Steel Sink

title: Product Care (7/8)
body:
The surface scratches which appear on stainless steel sinks rarely have any appreciable depth and will become less noticeable with age. All stainless steel sink will develop a patina with time and will look better a year after installation than during the first few months of use due to the fact that the scratching will have evened out. All sinks manufactured in stainless steel perform in exactly the same way in this respect be the Stylish’s manufacture or by a competitor.
We recommend the use of products like 'Bar Keepers Friend’ (available from most major supermarkets). It is helpful to dry the sink thoroughly after cleaning.
Most stains are a result of water-borne minerals. Such stains are often seen as a rainbow effect and can generally be avoided with the daily care recommendations above. Rust stains are a result of iron particles from an outside source (i.e., water, cookware, etc.) and can be removed with cleaners containing oxalic acid (such as Bar Keepers Friend). Steel wool pads leave tiny particles that will develop into rust spots. Stainless steel is, by itself, metallurgically incapable of rusting.

title: Product Care (8/8)
body: Never use steel wool to clean your stainless steel sink. Persistent stains, including rust, can be removed with a variety of mild non-abrasive stainless steel cleaners such as 'Autosol Shine' cream, and others. Always rinse thoroughly after using any cleaner, and wipe your sink dry with a clean soft cloth.

title: Kitchen Sink Installation Options (1/2)
body:
Kitchen Sink Installation Options
STYLISH® offers a variety of sink installations to fit your individual needs. Browse through the tabs below to find out which sink installation is right for you.
UNDERMOUNT SINK INSTALLATION
For Kitchen sinks, the under-mount installation is the most common option used for solid countertop materials as it offers a clean look with the big advantage of no sink rim to catch dirt.
There are three under-mount styles depending on the individual preferences, and they are related to the position of the sink opening to the countertop cut-out size
1-Zero Reveal or flush-mount, the cut-out is at the same level as the sink opening, most of the DXF or PDF files in Stylish website are specified with this style.
2-Partial Reveal, a small part of the sink flange is visible when looking from the top, the amount of reveal depends on the look desired, this is the least used style.
3-Negative Reveal or over-hang is when the countertop extends over the edge of the sink opening on all sides. Normally the countertop opening hangs over about 1/8th of an inch. With this style the sink edge is completely covered and makes it easier to hide installation imperfections, it also makes it easier for the wiping of crumbs into the sink, this is one of the most popular choices for under-mount sinks installation.

title: Kitchen Sink Installation Options (2/2)
body:
To find the cut-out dimensions for your sink, search and find your sink model on our website and then check the section “documents to download”, notice that DXF files require CAD software to be read.
Also known as top-mount. STYLISH® drop-in sinks sit in appropriately shaped cut in the countertop. The advantage of a top-mount sink is that the cut do not need to be as smooth compared with the undermount installation.
Top-mount sinks are therefore suspended by their rim. Installation is usually easier to do and is ideal for many countertops.
General installation tips:
Check the instructions on the template that comes with your STYLISH® sink.
Sink templates are supplied only as a guide. It is important to physically measure the sink and the countertop for a more accurate cutout.
Ensure enough space is left behind the sink for any faucets or accessories.
Selecting the Right Sink Size
Start by measuring the interior width (left to right) of your base cabinet.
This number should be the maximum kitchen sink size you can buy.
For example, if you measure the internal width of your cabinet and the measurement is 30.5".
The largest size you can buy is a 30 inches sink.

title: How to Remove a Protective Film | Stylish ®
body:
How-to video tutorial (playlist: How to...? - Kitchen Sinks): How to Remove a Protective Film | Stylish ®
Stylish provide most of the sinks with film protection to ensure final customer gets the perfect sink without any mark or scratch that can happen during renovation or installation, but film should be removed before sink usage.

If sink was exposed to cold temperature, bring sink inside and leave for at least 3 hours before starting film removal

If need to remove film faster, use hair dryer to warm up sink walls and get film to come off easier

title: How to Determine the Right Size of your Undermount Sink
body:
How-to video tutorial (playlist: How to...? - Kitchen Sinks): How to Determine the Right Size of your Undermount Sink
WHERE TO BUY

- Amazon:
https://www.amazon.ca/stores/page/1ACFCB02-40B8-4789-9CC4-503F1CD92767?ingress=3 

- Best Buy:
https://www.bestbuy.ca/en-ca/search?path=brandName%253aSTYLISH&search=stylish+sinks 

- Wayfair:
 https://www.wayfair.ca/brand/bnd/stylish-b43364.html 

- SInks Direct:
https://www.sinksdirect.ca/



How to Determine the Right Size of your Undermount Sink

Planning on renovating your kitchen or changing your kitchen countertops? 

Need a sink and don’t know what size to buy?

In this video we will explain you how to choose the right undermount kitchen sink size

1.Let's find out HOW WIDE IS THE INTERIOR OF YOUR CABINET?

Start by measuring the interior width of your base cabinet. Measure the interior of the cabinet from left to right (A)

GOT A NUMBER?... All right! Right it down

2.Let's find out HOW WIDE SHOULD  YOUR NEW SINK BE?
Subtract ½” from the internal cabinet size dimension(A) and you will determine the maximum external sink size (B)  

B = External  kitchen sink width
From the edge of the flange to the other edge of the flange

LET'S SEE AN EXAMPLE

Lets say you measured the interior width of your base cabinet and you got the number 28  ½”

So you are going to subtract ½" from 28 ½"

Which is: 28"

Therefore 28 inches is the maximum size of sink you can fit in your kitchen cabinet

Whether you like a single bowl or a double bowl sink,  at Stylish® we got you covered, with so many sink sizes and designs to choose from, and great quality with every sink, Stylish is sure to have your dream sink.

ST-03 Luxury Stainless Steel Sink Basket Strainer

Upgrade your kitchen or laundry room sink with this sleek removable deep basket strainer by STYLISH® designed to add functionality and style. 

This functional kitchen sink strainer will add a Stylish touch to your kitchen. This premium sink drainer comes with a luxury basket strainer. They are deeper and much more functional for catching food scraps than the regular strainers.
These sink strainers will perfectly fit any sink with a 3.5 Inch opening.
Made of quality T-304 stainless steel, this strainer seamlessly fits with most stainless steel kitchen sinks and it is also a great accent piece for ceramic or stone composite sinks.

Features:

Buy with confidence, knowing that our sinks meet the highest plumbing standards in North America. These Stylish® basket strainer units are made to fit any sink with a standard 3-1/2” drain opening
**EXCELLENT DESIGN: This sink drain strainer lets water pass through but not food particles. Easy to remove and clean, deep stainless-steel waste basket.
**OPEN/CLOSE STOPPER: Creates a tight seal that prevents food and debris from clogging the drain pipe. Push in stopper cap with rubber gasket
**REMOVABLE BASKET STRAINER: The basket strainer can be lifted out of the drain opening, allowing you to easily clear any trapped matter

Dimensions:

*Exterior dimensions: 4-1/2 inch diameter.

title: Removing Kitchen Sink Scratches by Stylish®
body:
How-to video tutorial (playlist: How to...? - Kitchen Sinks): Removing Kitchen Sink Scratches by Stylish®
Stylish® stainless steel sinks are made from premium quality chrome nickel steel, which offers excellent strength and hardness, is highly resistant to staining, rust and corrosion - plus it won't chip, craze, flake or break.

How to Take Care of your Sink?

Discolouration and most marks on stainless steel are caused by water-borne deposits clinging to its surface. They are always the result of an outside source rather than coming from the steel itself.

Here are Some Cleaning Tips

Rinse and dry your sink with a clean soft cloth, working with, not across, the grain; to prevent surface spots and lime build up stains caused by the water we use.
Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain the original appearance of your sink. Products like ‘Shiny Sinks’ or ‘Flitz & Bar Keepers Friend’ (available from most major supermarkets) can be used daily. It is helpful to dry the sink thoroughly after cleaning.
  Avoid:

Using abrasive sponge pads, wire brushes, metal scrub packs or steel wool as these items will scratch your sink as well as dull the finish.
Leaving salt, vinegar, citric fruit juices, mustard or pickles on the surface for any length of time as they can cause corrosion
 Abrasive cleaners such as bleach as these products will dull and tarnish the finish.
Defrosting frozen food directly on the surface of your sink as it will discolour the stainless steel. It is recommended to use a plate or pot which is placed in your sink.
Leaving wet sponges or cloths in or on the sink surface for long periods of time as they too may discolour the sinks. Similarly, the use of rubber coated mats may discolour the sink under prolong use.
 

Scratching

The surface scratches which appear on stainless steel sinks rarely have any appreciable depth and will become less noticeable with age. A stainless steel sink will develop a patina with time and will look better a year after installation than during the first few months of use due to the fact that the scratching will have evened out. All sinks manufactured in stainless steel perform in exactly the same way.

We recommend the use of a Stylish® stainless steel  grid that fits inside the bottom of your sink bowls and protect the sink from scratches.

See more at www.stylishkb.com
Purchase our sinks online at www.sinksdirect.ca

chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain
the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly
rinse your sink and wipe it dry. We recommend the use of a stainless
steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

cleaner and then quickly rinse with water and dry with soft cloth
only.

detergent, polisher or scraper will damage the finish and void the
warranty.

shroud. Turn faucet to desired
handle position. Securely tighten

title: K-107-installation-manual-2019 (2/2)
body:
Ensure there is a Ø35mm
through-hole on the kitchen
counter.
Position faucet on the installation
surface. Fit flexible hoses through
hole on countertop or sink.
Connect pullout hose to quick
connect and insert weight
(loose-install).
Before connecting supply hose,
flush supply valves to clear any
debris. Place a bucket under-
neath valves and run water for 5
to 10 seconds. Turn water off.
Unscrew spray head by hand.
Hold the tip of the spray hose
down and turn on the faucet
and let the water run 60 seconds
to flush any debris,
the re-connect spray head.
Ensure gasket is present.
Shut off
water supply
Flush hot and cold
water supply lines
Required tools Installation by License
Professional Plumber
Flush the water pipe
before installation
Drawings are for
reference only

title: K-146-installation-manual-2020 (2/2)
body:
Ensure there is a Ø35mm
through-hole on the kitchen
counter.
Position faucet on the installation
surface. Fit flexible hoses through
hole on countertop or sink.
Connect pullout hose to quick
connect and insert weight
(loose-install).
Before connecting supply hose,
flush supply valves to clear any
debris. Place a bucket under-
neath valves and run water for 5
to 10 seconds. Turn water off.
Unscrew spray head by hand.
Hold the tip of the spray hose
down and turn on the faucet
and let the water run 60 seconds
to flush any debris,
the re-connect spray head.
Ensure gasket is present.
Shut off
water supply
Flush hot and cold
water supply lines

before installation

P-204
PORCELAIN SINK
RECTANGULAR UNDERMOUNT BATHROOM SINK
DIMENSIONS
INCLUDED ACCESSORIES INSTALLATION OPTIONS
SMOOTH SURFACE CABINET SIZE MATERIAL PRODUCT DIMENSIONS
PRODUCT CARE WARRANTY
STANDARDS COMPLIANCE
This product is covered by a limited lifetime warranty.
Consult our website for complete details.
CSA certified
cUPC certified
ISO 9001 certified
Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

Pour nettoyer un gant en silicone :
1. Lavez à la main vos gants sous l’eau chaude et frottez-les
avec une éponge.
2. Ce produit va au lave-vaisselle.
3. Sécher avec un chiffon ou une serviette.

PRODUCT CARE
To clean a bamboo cutting board:
1. Hand wash your board under warm water and scrub it with a
sponge.
2. Sanitize or disinfect your board from time to time. Soak a cloth
in a solution of half water, half white
vinegar, then wipe both sides of the board.
3. Dry the board in a vertical position.
4. If you want to get your board back to “looking new”
appearance, use bamboo finishing oil.
For best care of your bamboo cutting board, avoid:
1. Washing your board in the dishwasher.
2. Using hard chemicals, like bleach.
3. Soaking in water.

1. With the drain cap in the open position, turn the drain
counterclockwise to remove the drain cap and seal.
2. The clicker assembly may come off with the drain cap and seal,
or it may remain on the body. If the clicker assembly remains in the

title: d-700-installation-manual (2/2)
body:
drain assembly, remove it by turning it counterclockwise.
3. Separate the cap from the seal.
4. Remove dirt and debris from all exposed surfaces, including
those of the drain body.
5. Carefully inspect the seal for excessive wear or damage,
and replace it if necessary.
6. The clicker assembly should click open and closed when
pressed together. Inspect the clicker assembly for proper
operation, and replace it if necessary.
7. Thread the clicker assembly into the drain body.
8. Securely finger tighten. Do not tighten with a spanner

5. Carefully inspect the seal for excessive wear or damage,
and replace it if necessary.
6. The clicker assembly should click open and closed when
pressed together. Inspect the clicker assembly for proper
operation, and replace it if necessary.
7. Thread the clicker assembly into the drain body.
8. Securely finger tighten. Do not tighten with a spanner
Lower Gasket

from the threaded shroud.

title: ST-03-installation-manual-2020 (1/2)
body:
INSTALLATION GUIDE
ST-03
LUXURY BASKET STRAINER
1. Rinse the strainer with water.
2. Coat the strainer with baking soda, Flitz or Barkeepers friend.
3. With sponge, scrub strainer and all sink walls in the direction of
4. Spray on undiluted vinegar.
the steel grain.
CARE AND CLEANING
5. Rinse again.
6. Buff with a few drops of olive oil.
7. If necessary, repeat procedure.
TOLL
FREE
IF YOU HAVE PURCHASED A LUXURY BASKET STRAINER, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THESE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY
Place foam gasket and strainer body on
the top side of drain opening.
Alternatively Plumber's Putty could be
used instead of foam gasket.
From underneath bring outer basket with
rubber gasket under the sink and secure
with basket nut.
Tighten basket nut using channel locks or
wrench.
Insert tail pipe with nut into home's
plumbing, then align and secure
tail pipe nut to strainer body.
Tighten tail pipe nut to strainer body,
ensure the rubber gasket is present. Run water and confirm no leaks.

Rinse and dry your sink with a clean soft cloth, working with, not a
cross, the grain.We recommend the use of a mild solution of water
and vinegar to remove any mineral deposits that may have built
up on your sink.
Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain
chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain
the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly
rinse your sink and wipe it dry. We recommend the use of a stainless
steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

strength and hardness.

Rinse and dry your sink with a clean soft cloth, working with, not a
cross, the grain.We recommend the use of a mild solution of water
and vinegar to remove any mineral deposits that may have built
up on your sink.
Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain
chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain
the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly
rinse your sink and wipe it dry. We recommend the use of a stainless
steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

GARANTIE
INSTALLATION DU ROBINET
Assurez-vous d'avoir un trou
traversant de Ø35mm de
diamètre sur le comptoir de la

several hours, rub your fingers and use a tooth brush to remove

mineral deposits, place aerator back into original position.

RIVO
K-148
ROBINET DE CUISINE
Nettoyez fréquemment le robinet à l'aide d'un savon doux ou d'un
nettoyant non abrasif, puis rincez-le rapidement à l'eau et séchez-le
avec un chiffon doux.
L'utilisation de nettoyants abrasifs, de solvants, de nettoyants
acides ou de tout autre détergent à récurer, polisseur ou grattoir
endommagera la finition et annulera la garantie.
2
Placez le robinet sur la surface
d'installation. Installez les tuyaux
flexibles dans le trou du comptoir ou
de l'évier.
Faites glisser la rondelle et vissez
l'écrou de montage sur l'enveloppe
filetée. Tournez le robinet vers la
position désirée. Serrez fermement la
poignée. Serrez fermement les vis de
serrage (E).
3 4
Fixer le poids sur le point vertical le
plus bas du côté du tuyau
extensible. (pas du côté de la
connexion rapide).
5 6
Raccordez les conduites d’eau
chaude et froide au tuyau
d’entrée et serrez-les bien à l'aide
d'une clé. Ne pas trop serrer.
7 8
Raccordez le tuyau flexible au
raccord rapide et insérez le poids
(installation libre)
Avant de brancher le tuyau
d'alimentation, rincez les vannes
d'alimentation pour éliminer tout
débris. Placez un seau sous les
vannes et faites couler l'eau
pendant 5 à 10 secondes.
Coupez l'eau.

title: k-148_installation_manual_english_and_french (4/4)
body:
Dévisser la tête de pulvérisation à
la main. Maintenez l'extrémité du
tuyau de pulvérisation enfoncée,
ouvrez le robinet et laissez couler
l'eau pendant 60 secondes pour
rincer tout débris, puis rebranchez
la tête de pulvérisation.
Assurez-vous de la présence d'un
joint d'étanchéité.

position désirée. Serrez fermement la
poignée. Serrez fermement les vis de
serrage (E).
3 4

plus bas du côté du tuyau
extensible. (pas du côté de la
connexion rapide).
5 6
Raccordez les conduites d’eau
chaude et froide au tuyau
d’entrée et serrez-les bien à l'aide
d'une clé. Ne pas trop serrer.

Avant de brancher le tuyau
d'alimentation, rincez les vannes
d'alimentation pour éliminer tout
débris. Placez un seau sous les
vannes et faites couler l'eau
pendant 5 à 10 secondes.

Dévisser la tête de pulvérisation à
la main. Maintenez l'extrémité du
tuyau de pulvérisation enfoncée,
ouvrez le robinet et laissez couler
l'eau pendant 60 secondes pour
rincer tout débris, puis rebranchez
la tête de pulvérisation.
Assurez-vous de la présence d'un
joint d'étanchéité.

KITCHEN FAUCET
Clean the faucet frequently using mild soap or an on-abrasive
cleaner and then quickly rinse with water and dry with soft cloth
only.
Using abrasive cleaners, solvents, acid cleaners or any scrubbing
detergent, polisher or scraper will damage the finish and void the
warranty.
2

surface. Fit flexible hoses through
hole on countertop or sink.
Slide washer and thread the
mounting nut onto threaded
shroud. Turn faucet to desired
handle position. Securely tighten
clamp screws (E).

K-130
ROBINET DE CUISINE
Nettoyez fréquemment le robinet à l'aide d'un savon doux ou d'un
nettoyant non abrasif, puis rincez-le rapidement à l'eau et séchez-le
avec un chiffon doux.
L'utilisation de nettoyants abrasifs, de solvants, de nettoyants
acides ou de tout autre détergent à récurer, polisseur ou grattoir
endommagera la finition et annulera la garantie.
2
Placez le robinet sur la surface
d'installation. Installez les tuyaux
flexibles dans le trou du comptoir ou
de l'évier.
Faites glisser la rondelle et vissez
l'écrou de montage sur l'enveloppe
filetée. Tournez le robinet vers la
position désirée. Serrez fermement la
poignée. Serrez fermement les vis de
serrage (E).
3 4
Fixer le poids sur le point vertical le
plus bas du côté du tuyau
extensible. (pas du côté de la
connexion rapide).
5 6
Raccordez les conduites d’eau
chaude et froide au tuyau
d’entrée et serrez-les bien à l'aide
d'une clé. Ne pas trop serrer.
7 8
Raccordez le tuyau flexible au
raccord rapide et insérez le poids
(installation libre)
Avant de brancher le tuyau
d'alimentation, rincez les vannes
d'alimentation pour éliminer tout
débris. Placez un seau sous les
vannes et faites couler l'eau
pendant 5 à 10 secondes.
Coupez l'eau.

Consult our website for complete details. Wipe faucet with damp cloth and mild household cleanser.
Dry with soft cloth to maintain original appearance.
Remove hard water stains with 50/50 solution vinegar and water.
If mineral deposits are too hard to remove, specially in the
aerator, unscrew aerator by hand or with tool provided with
faucet, soak aerator in 50/50 vinegar and water solution for
several hours, rub your fingers and use a tooth brush to remove
mineral deposits, place aerator back into original position.

To clean a Stainless Steel colander:
1.Rinse the colander with water.
2. Coat the colander with baking soda, Flitz or Barkeepers friend.
3. With sponge, scrub all colander walls in the direction of the
steel grain.
4. Spray on undiluted vinegar.
5. Rinse again.
6. Buff with a few drops of olive oil.
7. If necessary, repeat procedure.

Rinse and dry your sink with a clean soft cloth, working with, not a
cross, the grain.We recommend the use of a mild solution of water
and vinegar to remove any mineral deposits that may have built
up on your sink.
Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain
chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain
the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly
rinse your sink and wipe it dry. We recommend the use of a stainless
steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

steel with 18/10 chrome-nickel
content. The 18% of chrome

maximum protection against
rust and a beautiful satin finish.
The 10% of nickel
content provides excellent
strength and hardness.

Rincez et séchez votre évier avec un chiffon doux et propre, en
veillant à frotter dans le sens du grain. Nous recommandons
l'utilisation d'un doux mélange d'eau et de vinaigre pour éliminer
les dépôts de minéraux qui peuvent éventuellement s'accumuler
sur votre évier.
Utilisez des crèmes nettoyantes liquides non abrasives qui ne
contiennent pas de chlore, d’hypochlorite de sodium ou d’acide
chlorhydrique pour aider à conserver l’aspect original de votre
évier. Assurez-vous de bien rincer votre évier et de l'essuyer. Nous
recommandons l'utilisation d'une grille en acier inoxydable qui
s'insère au fond de l'évier et le protège des rayures.

offre une excellente solidité et
résistance.

2. Sanitize or disinfect your board from time to time. Soak a cloth
in a solution of half water, half white
vinegar, then wipe both sides of the board.
3. Dry the board in a vertical position.
4. If you want to get your board back to “looking new”
appearance, use bamboo finishing oil.
For best care of your bamboo cutting board, avoid:
1. Washing your board in the dishwasher.
2. Using hard chemicals, like bleach.
3. Soaking in water.

1. With the drain cap in the open position, turn the drain
counterclockwise to remove the drain cap and seal.
2. The clicker assembly may come off with the drain cap and seal,
or it may remain on the body. If the clicker assembly remains in the
drain assembly, remove it by turning it counterclockwise.
3. Separate the cap from the seal.
4. Remove dirt and debris from all exposed surfaces, including
those of the drain body.
5. Carefully inspect the seal for excessive wear or damage,
and replace it if necessary.
6. The clicker assembly should click open and closed when
pressed together. Inspect the clicker assembly for proper
operation, and replace it if necessary.

title: b_111_d_700g_installation_manual_english_and_french_combo (6/6)
body:
2. L'ensemble de cliquet peut se détacher avec le bouchon de
vidange et le joint, ou il peut rester sur le corps. Si l'assemblage de
cliquet reste dans l'assemblage de vidange, retirez-le en le tournant
dans le sens inverse des aiguilles d'une montre.
3. Séparez le capuchon du joint.
4. Enlevez la saleté et les débris de toutes les surfaces exposées, y
compris celles du corps du drain.
5. Inspectez soigneusement le joint pour déceler une usure
excessive ou des dommages et remplacez-le si nécessaire.
6. L'assemblage de cliquet doit cliquer pour s'ouvrir et se fermer
lorsqu'il est pressé ensemble. Inspectez l'ensemble de cliquet pour
un fonctionnement correct et remplacez-le si nécessaire.
7. Enfilez le cliquet dans le corps du drain.
8. Serrez fermement à la main. Ne serrez pas avec une clé.

Use mild non-abrasive liquid cream cleaners that do not contain
chlorine, sodium hypochlorite or hydrochloric acid to help maintain
the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly
rinse your sink and wipe it dry. We recommend the use of a stainless
steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

the original appearance of your sink. Ensure that you thoroughly

steel grid that fits inside the bottom of the sink bowl and protect
the sink from scratches.

CARE AND CLEANING

title: C233_azuni_dualmount_installation_manual_english (3/6)
body:
Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
Note: If sink is installed using Option 2 it will require
special means to hold sink in place while adhesive
silicone cures.
6
8
1. Rinse the sink with water.
2. Coat the sink with baking soda, Flitz or Barkeepers friend.
3. With sponge, scrub all sink walls in the direction
4. Spray on undiluted vinegar.
5. Rinse again.
6. Buff with a few drops of olive oil.
7. If necessary, repeat procedure.
8. We recommend the use of a stainless steel bottom grid of the steel grain.
Clean sink flange and underside of cut-out area of
countertop, making sure that the area is smooth and
free of debris. Apply continuous bead of silicone caulk
evenly on top of sink flange.
7

title: C132_azuni_dualmount_installation_manual_english (3/6)
body:
Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
Note: If sink is installed using Option 2 it will require
special means to hold sink in place while adhesive
silicone cures.

4. Spray on undiluted vinegar.

6. Buff with a few drops of olive oil.
7. If necessary, repeat procedure.
8. We recommend the use of a stainless steel bottom grid of the steel grain.
Clean sink flange and underside of cut-out area of
countertop, making sure that the area is smooth and
free of debris. Apply continuous bead of silicone caulk
evenly on top of sink flange.

continuous bead of silicone caulk evenly on top of sink
flange.

Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,

Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
Note: If sink is installed using Option 2 it will require
special means to hold sink in place while adhesive
silicone cures.

countertop, making sure that the area is smooth and
free of debris. Apply continuous bead of silicone caulk
evenly on top of sink flange.

Apply hot water and a few drops of mild dish soap.
Scrub the sink using the sponge.
After you have thoroughly scrubbed the sink, rinse it and dry using a soft cloth.
Optional: you could use a small amount of mineral oil to restore your sink's shine.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
For Option 1 and 2: To allow silicone to cure, it is
recommended to wait for 24 hours at least before
removing installation device.
7
Clamp the sink and hold in place while adhesive cures.
There are different methods, we suggest using a couple
of pieces of wood with a threaded rod. Set one piece of

title: S-833W_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (5/8)
body:
wood under the sink and another over the countertop.
Clamp the boards so the sink stays suspended about 1 in
below the countertop. Clean sink flange and
underside of cut-out area of countertop, making sure
that the area is smooth and free of debris. Apply
continuous bead of silicone caulk evenly on top of sink
flange.

title: S-833W_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (6/8)
body:
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

title: S-833W_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (7/8)
body:
Clean sink flange and underside of cut-out area of
countertop, making sure that the area is smooth and
free of debris. Apply continuous bead of silicone.
-- 6 of 7 --
CARE AND CLEANING
5
Position and align sink over opening. Press sink onto
silicone seal.
6
Page 3
Apply hot water and a few drops of mild dish soap.
Scrub the sink using the sponge.
After you have thoroughly scrubbed the sink, rinse it and dry using a soft cloth.
Optional: you could use a small amount of mineral oil to restore your sink's shine.
Check alignment of sink again to secure sink. Wipe
away excess silicone caulk with damp cloth. Connect
drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
7

it is recommended to wait for 24 hours to allow silicone
adhesive to cure, also keep at least 20 pounds weight
on the sink to ensure full sealing and curing of the
silicone on the whole mounting flange.

Apply hot water and a few drops of mild dish soap.

of pieces of wood with a threaded rod. Set one piece of

title: S-832W_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (5/8)
body:
wood under the sink and another over the countertop.
Clamp the boards so the sink stays suspended about 1 in
below the countertop. Clean sink flange and
underside of cut-out area of countertop, making sure
that the area is smooth and free of debris. Apply
continuous bead of silicone caulk evenly on top of sink
flange.

UNDERMOUNT

Apply hot water and a few drops of mild dish soap.
Scrub the sink using the sponge.
After you have thoroughly scrubbed the sink, rinse it and dry using a soft cloth.
Optional: you could use a small amount of mineral oil to restore your sink's shine.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
For Option 1 and 2: To allow silicone to cure, it is
recommended to wait for 24 hours at least before
removing installation device.
7
Clamp the sink and hold in place while adhesive cures.
There are different methods, we suggest using a couple
of pieces of wood with a threaded rod. Set one piece of

title: S-827_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (5/8)
body:
wood under the sink and another over the countertop.
Clamp the boards so the sink stays suspended about 1 in
below the countertop. Clean sink flange and
underside of cut-out area of countertop, making sure
that the area is smooth and free of debris. Apply
continuous bead of silicone caulk evenly on top of sink
flange.

title: S-827_stylish_dualmount_installation_manual_english (6/8)
body:
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

5
Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
Note: If sink is installed using Option 2 it will require
special means to hold sink in place while adhesive
silicone cures.

evenly on top of sink flange.

cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink

CARE AND CLEANING
5
Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.
Note: If sink is installed using Option 2 it will require
special means to hold sink in place while adhesive
silicone cures.

5
Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Clamp the sink and hold in place while adhesive cures.
There are different methods, we suggest using a couple
of pieces of wood with a threaded rod. Set one piece of
wood under the sink and another over the countertop.
Clamp the boards so the sink stays suspended about 1 in
below the countertop. Clean sink flange and
underside of cut-out area of countertop, making sure
that the area is smooth and free of debris. Apply
continuous bead of silicone caulk evenly on top of sink
flange.

Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with

drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.

special means to hold sink in place while adhesive

Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with

drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.

to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.

Tail Pipe
Tail Pipe
1. With the drain cap in the open position, turn the drain
counterclockwise to remove the drain cap and seal.
2. The clicker assembly may come off with the drain cap and seal,
or it may remain on the body. If the clicker assembly remains in the
drain assembly, remove it by turning it counterclockwise.
3. Separate the cap from the seal.
4. Remove dirt and debris from all exposed surfaces, including
those of the drain body.
5. Carefully inspect the seal for excessive wear or damage,
and replace it if necessary.
6. The clicker assembly should click open and closed when
pressed together. Inspect the clicker assembly for proper
operation, and replace it if necessary.
7. Thread the clicker assembly into the drain body.
8. Securely finger tighten. Do not tighten with a spanner

nettoyant non abrasif, puis rincez-le rapidement à l'eau et séchez-le
avec un chiffon doux.
L'utilisation de nettoyants abrasifs, de solvants, de nettoyants
acides ou de tout autre détergent à récurer, polisseur ou grattoir
endommagera la finition et annulera la garantie.
2
Placez le robinet sur la surface
d'installation. Installez les tuyaux
flexibles dans le trou du comptoir ou
de l'évier.
Faites glisser la rondelle et vissez
l'écrou de montage sur l'enveloppe
filetée. Tournez le robinet vers la
position désirée. Serrez fermement la
poignée. Serrez fermement les vis de
serrage (E).
3 4
Fixer le poids sur le point vertical le
plus bas du côté du tuyau
extensible. (pas du côté de la
connexion rapide).
5 6
Raccordez les conduites d’eau
chaude et froide au tuyau
d’entrée et serrez-les bien à l'aide
d'une clé. Ne pas trop serrer.
7 8
Raccordez le tuyau flexible au
raccord rapide et insérez le poids
(installation libre)
Avant de brancher le tuyau
d'alimentation, rincez les vannes
d'alimentation pour éliminer tout
débris. Placez un seau sous les
vannes et faites couler l'eau
pendant 5 à 10 secondes.
Coupez l'eau.

la main. Maintenez l'extrémité du

ouvrez le robinet et laissez couler
l'eau pendant 60 secondes pour
rincer tout débris, puis rebranchez
la tête de pulvérisation.
Assurez-vous de la présence d'un
joint d'étanchéité.

Si les dépôts de minéraux sont trop difficiles à enlever, spécialement
dans l'aérateur, dévissez-le à la main ou à l'aide d'un outil fourni avec
le robinet, trempez-le dans un mélange de 50 % d'eau et 50 % de
vinaigre pendant plusieurs heures, utilisez une brosse à dents pour
éliminer les dépôts de minéraux, et replacez-le dans sa position
originale.

until faucet is firmly secure.

K-151
FOLDING FAUCET
Clean the faucet frequently using mild soap or an on-abrasive
cleaner and then quickly rinse with water and dry with soft cloth
only.
Using abrasive cleaners, solvents, acid cleaners or any scrubbing
detergent, polisher or scraper will damage the finish and void the
warranty.
Before connecting supply hose,
flush supply valves to clear any
debris. Place a bucket underneath
valves and run water for 5 to 10
seconds. Turn water off.
Connect hot and cold water lines
to the inlet pipe and tighten with
a wrench until snug.
Do not over tight.

Si les dépôts de minéraux sont trop difficiles à enlever, spécialement
dans l'aérateur, dévissez-le à la main ou à l'aide d'un outil fourni avec
le robinet, trempez-le dans un mélange de 50 % d'eau et 50 % de
vinaigre pendant plusieurs heures, utilisez une brosse à dents pour
éliminer les dépôts de minéraux, et replacez-le dans sa position
originale.

To clean a Stainless Steel colander:
1.Rinse the colander with water.
2. Coat the colander with baking soda, Flitz or Barkeepers friend.
3. With sponge, scrub all colander walls in the direction of the
steel grain.
4. Spray on undiluted vinegar.
5. Rinse again.
6. Buff with a few drops of olive oil.
7. If necessary, repeat procedure.

This product is covered by a year warranty. Consult our website for complete details.
PRODUCT CARE
To clean a bamboo cutting board:
1. Hand wash your board under warm water and scrub it with a
sponge.
2. Sanitize or disinfect your board from time to time. Soak a cloth
in a solution of half water, half white
vinegar, then wipe both sides of the board.
3. Dry the board in a vertical position.
4. If you want to get your board back to “looking new”
appearance, use bamboo finishing oil.
For best care of your bamboo cutting board, avoid:
1. Washing your board in the dishwasher.
2. Using hard chemicals, like bleach.
3. Soaking in water.

body:
CHIC
P-200
PORCELAIN SINK
RECTANGULAR UNDERMOUNT BATHROOM SINK
DIMENSIONS
INCLUDED ACCESSORIES INSTALLATION OPTIONS
SMOOTH SURFACE CABINET SIZE MATERIAL PRODUCT DIMENSIONS
PRODUCT CARE WARRANTY
STANDARDS COMPLIANCE
This product is covered by a limited lifetime warranty.
Consult our website for complete details.
CSA certified
cUPC certified
ISO 9001 certified
Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

Nettoyez votre évier tous les jours pour éviter l'accumulation de
résidus de savon, de graisse et de saleté. Utilisez une éponge
humide avec un liquide vaisselle. Frottez la surface de l'évier avec

title: p_203d_spec_sheet_eng (3/4)
body:
un chiffon doux non abrasif ou une éponge. Essuyez l'évier avec un
torchon ou un chiffon doux pour enlever les taches d'eau. Pour un
nettoyage en profondeur, couvrez l’évier avec des serviettes en
papier ou en tissu et versez de l'eau de Javel non diluée.
Assurez-vous que la pièce est bien ventilée et laissez reposer les
serviettes imbibées d'eau de Javel pendant 15 à 30 minutes. Rincez
abondamment à l'eau et essuyez avec un torchon ou un chiffon
doux.
Nos éviers en porcelaine sont
fabriqués à partir d'un mélange
d'argile et d'autres minéraux,
vitrifiés et chauffés trois fois,
à une température d’environ
2000 ª F. On obtient ainsi une
surface en porcelaine brillante
appelée porcelaine vitrifiée, qui
est plus dense, plus brillante et
plus durable que la porcelaine
ordinaire.

1. Empty the sink: Make sure there's no water in the sink before you begin.
2. Remove the Stopper: Pull the pop-up stopper out of the drain.
3. Clean thoroughly: Brush the stopper and the visible drain to remove hair and debris.
Use cleaner or a mixture of baking soda and vinegar if there's a lot of buildup.
4. Reassemble: Put the stopper back in place.
5. Test: Test the drain with water to make sure it's working properly and there are no leaks.

PRODUCT CARE
To clean a resin cutting board:
1. Hand wash your board under warm water and scrub it with a
sponge.
2. Sanitize or disinfect your board from time to time. Soak a cloth
in a solution of half water, half white
vinegar, then wipe both sides of the board.
3. Dry the board in a vertical position.
For best care of your resin cutting board, avoid:
1. Washing your board in the dishwasher.
2. Using hard chemicals, like bleach.
3. Soaking in water.

ENTRETIEN
Pour nettoyer une planche à découper de résine :
1. Lavez à la main votre planche à l’eau chaude et
frottez-la avec une éponge.
2. Désinfectez ou désinfectez votre planche de temps à autre.
Trempez un chiffon dans une solution à moitié d’eau, à moitié blanche
vinaigre, puis essuyer les deux côtés de la planche.
3. Sécher la planche en position verticale.
Pour un meilleur entretien de votre planche à
découper de résine, évitez :
1. Laver la planche au lave-vaisselle.
2. Utilisation de produits chimiques durs, comme l’eau de Javel.
3. Trempage dans l’eau.

ENTRETIEN
Pour nettoyer une planche à découper de résine :
1. Lavez à la main votre planche à l’eau chaude et
frottez-la avec une éponge.
2. Désinfectez ou désinfectez votre planche de temps à autre.
Trempez un chiffon dans une solution à moitié d’eau, à moitié blanche
vinaigre, puis essuyer les deux côtés de la planche.
3. Sécher la planche en position verticale.
Pour un meilleur entretien de votre planche à
découper de résine, évitez :
1. Laver la planche au lave-vaisselle.
2. Utilisation de produits chimiques durs, comme l’eau de Javel.
3. Trempage dans l’eau.

title: p_201_spec_sheet_eng (1/2)
body:
TRENDY
P-201
PORCELAIN SINK
RECTANGULAR UNDERMOUNT BATHROOM SINK
DIMENSIONS
INCLUDED ACCESSORIES INSTALLATION OPTIONS
SMOOTH SURFACE CABINET SIZE MATERIAL PRODUCT DIMENSIONS
PRODUCT CARE WARRANTY
STANDARDS COMPLIANCE
This product is covered by a limited lifetime warranty.
Consult our website for complete details.
CSA certified
cUPC certified
ISO 9001 certified
Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

title: p_211h_installation_manual (1/5)
body:
IF YOU HAVE PURCHASED A TOPMOUNT SINK, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THESE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY
INSTALLATION GUIDE
PORCELAIN SINK
TOPMOUNT BATHROOM SINK
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.
3

warranty, please contact us.

according to manufacturer’s instruction.

body:

la garantie de votre évier, veuillez nous contacter.
www.stylishkb.com/warranty
Stylish International Inc. www.stylishkb.com stylish.international.inc care@stylishkb.com +1-855-789-5352 TOLL

+1-855-789-5352 www.stylishkb.com care@stylishkb.com
Les produits et spécifications présentés sont susceptibles d'être modifiés sans préavis. Veuillez contacter notre support technique à l'adresse care@stylishkb.com pour toute autre question, demande de pièces de rechange, etc. ©2022 Stylish® tous droits réservés.
Placez le gabarit de découpe dans la position
souhaitée sur le comptoir, en plaçant le centre de la
cuvette au-dessus du meuble.
Tracez le contour du gabarit et découpez le comptoir
selon le contour du gabarit en utilisant les outils de
coupe appropriés. Le modèle est donné à titre indicatif
seulement. Utilisez un évier pour assurer une ouverture
précise de la découpe.
Nettoyez le rebord de l'évier et le dessous de la zone
découpée du comptoir, en vous assurant que la zone
est lisse et exempte de débris. Appliquez un cordon
continu de mastic silicone .
-- 3 of 4 --
ENTRETIEN ET NETTOYAGE
5 6

GUIDE D'INSTALLATION

title: p_211h_installation_manual (5/5)
body:
Les produits et spécifications présentés sont susceptibles d'être modifiés sans préavis. Veuillez contacter notre support technique à l'adresse care@stylishkb.com pour toute autre question, demande de pièces de rechange, etc. ©2022 Stylish® tous droits réservés.
Stylish International Inc. www.stylishkb.com stylish.international.inc care@stylishkb.com +1-855-789-5352 TOLL
FREE
Déposez sur l'ouverture du comptoir.
Nettoyez votre évier tous les jours pour éviter une accumulation de résidus de savon, de graisse et de saleté. Utilisez une
éponge humide avec du liquide vaisselle. Frottez la surface de l'évier à l'aide d'un chiffon doux non abrasif ou d'une
éponge. Essuyez l'évier avec un torchon à vaisselle ou un autre chiffon doux pour éliminer les taches d'eau. Pour un
nettoyage en profondeur, recouvrez l'évier de serviettes en papier ou en tissu et versez de l'eau de Javel non diluée.
Veillez à ce que l'endroit soit bien ventilé et laissez reposer les serviettes saturées d'eau de Javel pendant 15 à 30
minutes. Rincez abondamment à l'eau et essuyez avec un torchon à vaisselle ou un autre chiffon doux.
Poussez l'évier vers le bas et assurez-vous qu'il est stable
et ne stable et ne bascule pas sur le comptoir. Essuyez
l'excédent de calfeutrage au silicone avec un chiffon
humide. Raccordez le drain et l'alimentation en eau
selon les instructions du fabricant.
-- 4 of 4 --

Clean your sink every day to prevent a buildup of soap scum,
grease and dirt. Use a wet sponge with liquid dishwashing. Scrub
the sink’s surface using a soft non-abrasive cloth or sponge. Wipe
the sink dry with a dish towel or other soft cloth to eliminate water
stains. For deep clean cover the sink with paper or cloth towels and
pour undiluted bleach. Be sure the area is well ventilated and let
the bleach-saturated towels sit for 15 to 30 minutes. Rinse
thoroughly with water and wipe dry with a dish towel or other soft
cloth.
Our procelain sinks are made
from mixture of clay and
other minerals, that is
triple-glazed and triple-fire
at about 2.000 ªF. The result is
a glossy porcelain surface
known as vitreous china,
which is denser, glossier and
more durable than regular
porcelain.

Nettoyez votre évier tous les jours pour éviter l'accumulation de
résidus de savon, de graisse et de saleté. Utilisez une éponge
humide avec un liquide vaisselle. Frottez la surface de l'évier avec
un chiffon doux non abrasif ou une éponge. Essuyez l'évier avec un

title: p_211h_spec_sheet (3/4)
body:
torchon ou un chiffon doux pour enlever les taches d'eau. Pour un
nettoyage en profondeur, couvrez l’évier avec des serviettes en
papier ou en tissu et versez de l'eau de Javel non diluée.
Assurez-vous que la pièce est bien ventilée et laissez reposer les
serviettes imbibées d'eau de Javel pendant 15 à 30 minutes. Rincez
abondamment à l'eau et essuyez avec un torchon ou un chiffon
doux.
Nos éviers en porcelaine sont
fabriqués à partir d'un mélange
d'argile et d'autres minéraux,
vitrifiés et chauffés trois fois,
à une température d’environ
2000 ª F. On obtient ainsi une
surface en porcelaine brillante
appelée porcelaine vitrifiée, qui
est plus dense, plus brillante et
plus durable que la porcelaine
ordinaire.

title: s_611wk_stylish_undermount_installation_manual_english (2/4)
body:
IF YOU HAVE PURCHASED A UNDERMOUNT SINK, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THESE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY
INSTALLATION GUIDE
UNDERMOUNT
STAINLESS STEEL KITCHEN SINK
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Note: Sink installation is normally
performed by the countertop provider.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
It is recommended to use the actual sink
dimensions to ensure the most accurate cut out.
Drawing or template are for reference.
Use scissors to cut along the line of the paper template
for you desired reveal type (Negative, Positive or Flush
Reveal)
3/8" Positive Reveal 3/8" Positive
1/8" Negative
1/8" Negative overhanging
Flush/Zero
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.

IF YOU HAVE PURCHASED A UNDERMOUNT SINK, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THESE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY
INSTALLATION GUIDE
UNDERMOUNT
STAINLESS STEEL KITCHEN SINK
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Note: Sink installation is normally
performed by the countertop provider.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
It is recommended to use the actual sink
dimensions to ensure the most accurate cut out.
Drawing or template are for reference.
Use scissors to cut along the line of the paper template
for you desired reveal type (Negative, Positive or Flush
Reveal)
3/8" Positive Reveal 3/8" Positive
1/8" Negative
1/8" Negative overhanging
Flush/Zero
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

Drill holes on the underside of the countertop,
approximately 1/2" from edge of the sink to be installed.
Holes should be evenly spaced approximately 6" to 8"
apart starting from every corner as shown below.
Option 2. Alternatively wood studs combined with
silicone caulk can be used to hold sink against
countertop without using mounting brackets.
Option 1. Insert anchors under the countertop on the
drilled holes, so they are ready to fasten the sink flange.
Anchors should be inserted with a hammer until flush.
Check alignment of sink again and tighten fasteners
to secure sink. Wipe away excess silicone caulk with
damp cloth. Connect drain and water supply
according to manufacturer’s instruction.

title: s_611wk_stylish_undermount_installation_manual_english_and_french (5/11)
body:
GUIDE D'INSTALLATION
ENCASTRÉ
ÉVIER DE CUISINE EN ACIER INOXYDABLE
GUARANTIE
1
Avant l'Installation:
Assurez-vous que vous disposez de toutes les pièces
nécessaires en consultant la liste des pièces. Si une
pièce est manquante, veuillez contacter le Service
Clientèle de Stylish® au 1-855-789-5352
pour un remplacement.
Inspectez l'évier avant l'installation pour vous assurer qu'il
n'a pas été endommagé pendant le transport.
Vous pouvez utiliser le modèle de découpe fourni ou
télécharger le fichier DXF sur www.stylishkb.com,
le fichier est disponible sous chaque modèle d'évier.
Respectez tous les règlements de plomberie et de
construction conformément aux exigences de votre
État.
Il n'est pas recommandé de l'installer avec un comptoir
en stratifié.

Placez le gabarit de découpe dans la position
souhaitée sur le comptoir, en plaçant le centre de la
cuvette au-dessus du meuble.
Remarque: l'installation de l'évier est normalement
effectuée par le fournisseur du comptoir.
Tracez le contour du gabarit et découpez le comptoir
selon le contour du gabarit en utilisant les outils de
coupe appropriés. Le modèle est donné à titre indicatif
seulement. Utilisez un évier pour assurer une ouverture
précise de la découpe.
Il est recommandé d'utiliser les dimensions réelles de
l'évier pour assurer la découpe la plus précise possible.
Le dessin ou le gabarit sert de référence.

3. Avec une éponge, frottez toutes les parois de l'évier
4. Vaporisez du vinaigre non dilué.
5. Rincez à nouveau.
6. Frottez avec quelques gouttes d'huile d'olive.
7. Si nécessaire, répétez la procédure.
8. Nous recommandons l'utilisation d'une grille de fond en dans le sens du grain d'acier.

Nettoyez le rebord de l'évier et le dessous de la zone

est lisse et exempte de débris. Appliquez un cordon
continu de mastic silicone de manière uniforme sur le
dessus de la bordure de l'évier.
Vérifiez à nouveau l'alignement de l'évier et resserrez les
attaches pour sécuriser l'évier. Essuyez l'excès de mastic
silicone avec un chiffon humide. Raccordez
l'évacuation et l'alimentation en eau conformément
aux instructions du fabricant.
Remarque: si l'évier est installé selon l'option 2, il faudra
prévoir des moyens spéciaux pour le maintenir en place
pendant que la silicone adhésive durcit.
Percez des trous sur la face inférieure du comptoir, à
environ 1/2 po. du bord de l'évier à installer. Les trous
doivent être régulièrement espacés d'environ 6 à 8
pouces à partir de chaque coin, comme indiqué

title: s_611wk_stylish_undermount_installation_manual_english_and_french (11/11)
body:
apriete los tornillos para asegurar el fregadero. Limpie el
exceso de masilla de silicona con paño húmedo.
Conecte el drenaje y el suministro de agua
según las instrucciones del fabricante.
Nota: Si el fregadero se instala utilizando la opción 2 se
requieren medios especiales para mantener el
fregadero en su lugar mientras que se cura la silicona
adhesiva.
Opción 2. También se pueden utilizar piezas de madera
combinados con masilla de silicona para sujetar el
fregadero contra la cubierta sin utilizar soportes de
montaje.
Opción 1. Inserte anclajes debajo de la cubierta en los
agujeros perforados, por lo que están listos para sujetar
la pestaña del fregadero. Los anclajes deben insertarse
con un martillo hasta quedar al ras.

WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Note: Sink installation is normally
performed by the countertop provider.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.

dimensions to ensure the most accurate cut out.

for you desired reveal type (Negative, Positive or Flush
Reveal)

1/8" Negative

Flush/Zero

Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

Remarque: l'installation de l'évier est normalement
effectuée par le fournisseur du comptoir.
Tracez le contour du gabarit et découpez le comptoir
selon le contour du gabarit en utilisant les outils de
coupe appropriés. Le modèle est donné à titre indicatif
seulement. Utilisez un évier pour assurer une ouverture
précise de la découpe.
Il est recommandé d'utiliser les dimensions réelles de
l'évier pour assurer la découpe la plus précise possible.

Clientèle de Stylish® au 1-855-789-5352

Respectez tous les règlements de plomberie et de
construction conformément aux exigences de votre
État.
Il n'est pas recommandé de l'installer avec un comptoir
en stratifié.

Placez le gabarit de découpe dans la position
souhaitée sur le comptoir, en plaçant le centre de la
cuvette au-dessus du meuble.
Remarque: l'installation de l'évier est normalement
effectuée par le fournisseur du comptoir.
Tracez le contour du gabarit et découpez le comptoir
selon le contour du gabarit en utilisant les outils de
coupe appropriés. Le modèle est donné à titre indicatif
seulement. Utilisez un évier pour assurer une ouverture
précise de la découpe.
Il est recommandé d'utiliser les dimensions réelles de
l'évier pour assurer la découpe la plus précise possible.
Le dessin ou le gabarit sert de référence.

3. Avec une éponge, frottez toutes les parois de l'évier

Nettoyez le rebord de l'évier et le dessous de la zone
découpée du comptoir, en vous assurant que la zone
est lisse et exempte de débris. Appliquez un cordon
continu de mastic silicone de manière uniforme sur le
dessus de la bordure de l'évier.
Vérifiez à nouveau l'alignement de l'évier et resserrez les
attaches pour sécuriser l'évier. Essuyez l'excès de mastic
silicone avec un chiffon humide. Raccordez
l'évacuation et l'alimentation en eau conformément
aux instructions du fabricant.
Remarque: si l'évier est installé selon l'option 2, il faudra
prévoir des moyens spéciaux pour le maintenir en place
pendant que la silicone adhésive durcit.
Percez des trous sur la face inférieure du comptoir, à
environ 1/2 po. du bord de l'évier à installer. Les trous
doivent être régulièrement espacés d'environ 6 à 8
pouces à partir de chaque coin, comme indiqué

body:
IF YOU HAVE PURCHASED A UNDERMOUNT SINK, PLEASE MAKE SURE TO READ THESE INSTRUCTIONS CAREFULLY
INSTALLATION GUIDE
UNDERMOUNT
STAINLESS STEEL KITCHEN SINK
WARRANTY
1
Place cut-out template in desired position
on countertop locating center of the bowl over cabinet.
Note: Sink installation is normally
performed by the countertop provider.
Trace the outline of the template and cut countertop
according to templated outline using appropriate
cutting tools. Template is for guide only. Use physical sink
to ensure accurate cut-out opening.
It is recommended to use the actual sink
dimensions to ensure the most accurate cut out.
Drawing or template are for reference.
Use scissors to cut along the line of the paper template
for you desired reveal type (Negative, Positive or Flush
Reveal)
3/8" Positive Reveal 3/8" Positive
1/8" Negative
1/8" Negative overhanging
Flush/Zero
Prior to installation:
Make sure that you have all necessary parts by
checking the parts list. If any part is missing, please
contact Stylish® Customer Service at +1-855-789-5352 for
a replacement.
Inspect the sink prior to installation to make sure that it
has not been damaged during shipping.
You may use the cut-out template provided or
download DXF file from www.stylishkb.com, the file is
available under each sink model.
Observe all plumbing and building codes according to
your state requirements.

Avant l'Installation:
Assurez-vous que vous disposez de toutes les pièces
